unity_note: Regenerate from Unity oracle: ProjectArchive/UnityKyndeBlade/KyndeBlade_Unity — menu KyndeBlade → Export Slice Data for Godot (writes KyndeBlade_Godot/data/)

locations.arrival_beat_text: A tour on a toft, trieliche ymaked—narwe, lovelich and selcouth. Fro this elritch heght thou overlookest the fayr feeld ful of folke. Hier the drem is stille; no triaile stireth. The Tour of Trewthe and the world bynethe abyden.

locations.description: Dream: The Fair Field full of folk.
locations.arrival_beat_text: A fayr feeld ful of folke fonde I ther bitwene. Wille seeth the feeld ful of folk—alle maner of men and wommen, werchynge.
